Tests the behavior of `Math.pow` with negative zero and negative one, expecting `-Infinity`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It verifies that raising negative zero to the power of negative one results in negative infinity, as per the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression `Math.pow(-0, -1)` evaluates to `-Infinity`. This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the mathematical correctness of this particular operation.
